programme.title: Bunker
programme.desc: Lt. Vikram Singh is the only army officer who survives an attack on his bunker as a result of a ceasefire violation. He's critically injured, alone and must fight delirium and severe anguish until he's rescued.

programme.title: Tango Charlie
programme.desc: Tarun, a BSF officer, along with his battalion gets deployed to Kargil when a war between India and Pakistan breaks out. This is where Tarun faces the life-threatening challenge.

programme.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.

programme.title: Bhagam Bhag
programme.desc: Bunty and Babla are two wannabe actors and want to play the lead in their theatre¡¯s play. Soon, their inappropriate behaviour causes the female lead to quit and they get tasked to finding another which hilariously lands them in a convoluted trouble.

programme.title: Billa 2
programme.desc: Small-time diamond smuggler David befriends Goa-based gangster Abbasi. However, when David begins to build inroads with an international criminal, Abbasi is not happy.

programme.title: Surya 420
programme.desc: A transgender man struggles to realise his sexual orientation while dealing with the social stigma and taboo related to gender transition in the society.

programme.title: Citizen
programme.desc: Antony assumes several identities and kidnaps three government officials in order to succeed in his secret mission. However, a CBI officer sets out to find the real identity of the kidnapper.

programme.title: Lousy neighbour
programme.desc: You're young, you're attractive, and you want to make something of yourself. In order to achieve success, you move to the big city with a heart full of certainty that luck is always on your side. But how to not lose yourself in the vast sea of countless opportunities? How to know what's really important for you and what is nonessential? Kate is a 23-year-old makeup artist from a small provincial town, and she's absolutely certain that she's got what it takes! She can do it - period! She's joyfully advancing towards her dream with a smile on her face, happy to help anyone in need of her positive attitude along the way. Not even sudden unexpected hardships and difficulties can get her down. But fate seems to be constantly testing her optimism. Will she make it through and come out a winner after all?

programme.title: It's Fixer upper
programme.desc: When The Dovers (Louise Dylan and Sean Wing) find themselves in financial jeopardy, they turn to Dan's parents' (Dee Wallace and Gary Neal Johnson) for help. His father thinks it is time for his son to learn some life lessons.

programme.title: The Duplicate
programme.desc: When Jessica asks her twin sister Alessandra for help with a blackmailer she gets more than she bargained for.

programme.title: A love Inspired Bestseller
programme.desc: In search of a muse to inspire his writing, a successful mystery author falls for a woman who turns out to be more complicated than she first seemed.

programme.title: The Gridiron
programme.desc: Living majority of his life as a dreamer, Derek has never amounted to anything no matter how hard he tried.

programme.title: Empire
programme.desc: Atia, the sister of Caesar, is coerced by the senate to reveal the contents of the late general's will.

programme.title: The Gridiron
programme.desc: Living majority of his life as a dreamer, Derek has never amounted to anything no matter how hard he tried.

programme.title: The Gridiron
programme.desc: Living majority of his life as a dreamer, Derek has never amounted to anything no matter how hard he tried.

programme.title: ABBA: Super Troupe
programme.desc: Few bands have been able to dominate the industry in the same way as ABBA.

programme.title: Shift
programme.desc: After meeting a mysterious stranger, a man must escape a dystopian world to return to his wife.

programme.title: In The Cage
programme.desc: Marvin Fields is caught up with challenges and obstacles. On the verge of losing his family, he has to step up and face his adversaries. Marvin tries different avenues to help eliminate these difficulties, but his efforts are futile. Now, he decides to take desperate measures in saving his family and finances. When hell breaks loose and nothing seems to work, a true character is revealed through Marvin. Later on, Marvin discovers martial arts through his best friend Frank Biggs. This martial art will help Marvin find himself again and give him a sense of purpose. As he continues to search deeper his new found art, his troubles aren't stagnant. Marvin still has to wake up and face the demons of his life. Marvin has got to get his life out of this never diminishing cage and find freedom. In the meantime, Claire Fields (Marvin's wife) is fed up and tired of supporting the family. Marvin's cage seems invisible to Claire, and this continues to trigger his frustration. In the end, true love and friendship will be revealed and seem to help break down the barriers around this mysterious cage.

programme.title: Preying for Mercy
programme.desc: After letting a bust go bad in New York he fled for his life and changed his identity. Now, nearly 15 years later, his past has caught up with him and the truths he worked so hard to hide are clawing their way to the surface.As he contends with an efficient and ruthless hit man sent after his family, Frank enlists the aid of his partners to put a stop to the on-coming assault. As the hit man zeros in and Frank is running out of time, he makes the only move he has left? the go on the run again, this time to secure the one secret he has left that could turn the tables around and turn him from the hunted to the hunter.James and Genie an estranged couple must go all the way to Vegas to rekindle a lost sparkle in their LAPD Detective Frank Gates is a hard working cop, a loving father and husband, and an all around good man. But beneath his gleaming veneer of happiness and stability lay a buried past wrought with secrets and violence.

programme.title: Hit-and-Run Squad
programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.desc: Add the stunning set of 2 1881 and 1885 Carson City Silver Morgan Dollar in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection. These epic rare silver coins have miniscule mintages of 296,000 and 228,000 respectively.

programme.title: Advancements
programme.desc: Hear how innovations in technology are disrupting industries for the better featuring ARCHES, The Predictive Index, Treasury Prime and CyberOne hosted by Ted Danson.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with David Blitzer, co-founder of Harris Blitzer Sports and Entertainment, to discuss how his teams use data and analytics to improve the fan experience.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Georgia Tech Athletics Director J Batt during March Madness to discuss the buzz around college athletics, including NIL and the transfer portal.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit down with Mellody Hobson, co-CEO and president of Ariel Investments, to discuss her firm's fund, Project Level, devoted to investing in women's sports.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit down with 26North founder and Washington Commanders owner Josh Harris to hear about the team's recent stadium deal in D.C. and his mindset on team ownership.

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: There's been a migration of financial powerbrokers to South Florida in recent years, drawn by the weather, light regulation and low taxes it's hard to imagine the capital of finance leaving New York, but Wall Street South is getting bigger.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: An estimated $1 trillion lost globally to fraud with law enforcement struggling to cope, scambaiter vigilantes are filling the gaps.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The demand for human eggs is booming, giving rise to a largely unregulated and dangerous marketplace in India, meeting a teenage girl caught up in this fertility underworld.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates: How a Ugandan Clinic Exposed
programme.desc: In a Kampala slum, a group of midwives help vulnerable mothers give birth for free. Under a mile away, a private hospital is out of reach for most of the community, with devastating consequences. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 34
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 31
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 31
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 32

The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: " Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child' s play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. " Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment. Toys, along with the audience, learn about colors, shapes, objects, come out of difficult situations, learn about friendship and the world in general. The series is simple, kind and funny.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Robinhood EP 01
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: Bob actually wanted to dig his way back to New York. But in the process he comes across an old treasure map. Together with Nel and Zaza, he sets off in search of Wirwindi's treasure.

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: Agents try to ruin the lives of the Queen and Shakespear.

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: One day, a sleeping boy called Slick lies in Milly's bed. Slick has run away from home and is now roaming around the neighborhood. Milly accuses the boy of stealing from her.

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: Uncle Fax has a toothache but doesn't want to go to the doctor / The friends go cycling and Lupo ends up in a cave. A Stone Age man finds the children / The cinema owner is ill and the small children are unhappy. The four friends want to help. / In the middle of the night, mom hears noises and sends the not at all brave men of the house to investigate. A rumbling surprise awaits them.

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: Hotel manager Hartacker tries to intimidate the crocodiles with a ghost show. But they see through his evil plan.

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: Milly is supposed to look after Humperdink the hamster for the weekend. Black Cat, however, reacts a little jealously and soon makes sure that the hamster disappears. Now Milly and Sam try to find the little creepy-crawly, but it is only when Milly invents a hamster search engine that they are successful. Humperdink is back, and Black Cat now knows that she has no reason to be jealous.

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: Phaedon just can't let it go. Time and again, he betrays and betrays the elves. Now he has hatched a particularly devious plan...

programme.title: Shadow of the Elves
programme.desc: Phaedon just can't let it go. Time and again, he betrays and betrays the elves. Now he has hatched a particularly devious plan...

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: Someone is dumping toxic waste into the sea! Monty has fallen ill from the toxic waste and has red spots all over him. Bob and his friends have to prevent others from getting infected.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: Some aliens have tracked down a boom cart. But the module has been stolen. The thieves have only left their initials behind: G.G. The Da Boom crew must track down the mysterious thieves.

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: The hacker tries to prevent Magellan from sailing around the world.

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: Gloria and her friend Millicent spend a day at a large amusement park. They have a lot of fun together until they lose sight of each other.

programme.title: Shadow of the Elves
programme.desc: Lord Kann gives Snakehammer an ultimatum. The scatterbrained inventor must finally come up with something tangible...

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: While fishing, a ghost ship suddenly emerges from the fog and rams the friends' boat the children now have to help the captain. / Prof. Knox has accidentally shrunk himself in a self-experiment and tries to get F&F's attention. / &F have a new computer game, but Lupo does everything wrong and eventually all three of them are drawn into the game / Dad drinks too much coffee and has to cut back for health reasons. Mom knows her husband and has prepared everything so that he can't get coffee anywhere in the city. It all ends up in the coffee factory.

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: When Milly takes her clothes into the kitchen to wash them, her father notices that Milly is missing some stockings. He asks her to look for them in her room. To make the search easier, Milly uses her father's clothes color selector. She soon realizes that the clothes colour selector is also great for finding stockings. The professor is also amazed and realizes once again what a wonderful daughter he has.

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: When Crocadoo runs out of food, crocodile Jazz looks for a job. Hotel manager Hartacker actually hires him as an assistant cook. In the meantime, surveyors turn up at the crocodiles.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: The Zoo

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Stop me if you heard this one before? What's fast, windy, and can ruin your day in seconds? Of course, we're talking about the weather. And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: When the weather gets rough, the brave start recording. From raging hurricanes to devastating dust storms, it's time to watch as we showcase some of the wildest weather ever caught on film. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Wind is whipping, thunder is clapping, and rain is pouring, but you're not out in the elements- you're watching another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Buckle up, folks, because we're headed straight into the eye of the hurricane, the mouth of the volcano, and the depths of the flood, and we're doing it all right here, on another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown, the only place where lightning can strike, the earth can quake, and the streets can flood, all in the same half hour!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Brace yourself, because unpredictable dust devils, mind blowing lightning displays, and glass shattering hail storms are all par for the course when Mother Nature puts us in our place here on Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: MOTHER NATURE UNPREDICTABLE, POWERFUL AND MESMERIZING. ANYTHING CAN CHANGE IN A SPLIT SECOND. FROM HEAVY RAIN, TO HAIL THE SIZE OF BASEBALLS, GIANT TORNADOS, AND WILDFIRES ENCAPSULATING THOUSANDS OF ACRES OF LAND, THIS IS JUST ANOTHER DAY HERE ON EXTREME WEATHER COUNTDOWN.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Today's forecast is quite the doozy! Wind, followed by hail, and then with a bit of a hurricane for good measure. No, it's not the end of the world...it's just another day here on Extreme Weather Countdown! j

programme.title: Animal Society

programme.title: Animal Society

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Sveti Đorđe Island is one of the two islets off the coast of Perast in the Bay of Kotor, Montenegro. Unlike Gospa od Škrpjela, it is a natural island.

programme.title: Tauric Chersonesos, Crimea
programme.desc: 528 BC. in the west of the Heracles Peninsula, the Dorian Greeks founded the city of Chersonesus in Crimea, which means "peninsula". Founded as a colony of the wealthy Greek city of Heraclea of Pontus, its history is part of the Ancient Greece, Ancient Rome and Byzantium. In the Middle Ages, Chersonesus was called Kherson.

programme.title: Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, Italy
programme.desc: Hidden in the hills of Italy lies Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, the Ducal Palace of Urbino. It may seem strange to find such grand Renaissance architecture outside of the great cities. We all know about Rome, Venice, Florence and their great works. But the Ducal Palace of Urbino is often forgotten, despite rivaling all of them with its splendor and great history.

programme.title: Kursi, National Park, Israel
programme.desc: We are 30km west of Jerusalem, on the border between the Judean Mountains and the Ayalon Valley, in the village of Nicopolis. You may know it better as Emmaus. Here, thanks to its strategic position, Emmaus has played an important role in the country's administrative, military and economic life many times in its history.

programme.title: Marmashen Monastery, Armenia
programme.desc: Here we are: in a beautiful valley on the left bank of Akhurian River, 10 km northwest of the city of Gyumri, 2 km southwest of the village of Vahramaberd in the Shirak region in Armenia. We are at Marmashen Monastery. Surrounded by fruit orchards this magnificent monument once was a prominent cultural and religious center and is considered as the finest example of the medieval architecture of Armenia…

programme.title: San Nicolo dei Mendicoli, Italy
programme.desc: Venice, the dream city in the north of Italy! It is located on 118 islands in the Venetian lagoon, separated by 150 canals and channels with about 400 bridges. Known as the Floating City or the City of Canals, Venice is a true monument city. The church of"&" San Nicolo dei Mendicoli is a historical and artistic achievement, inseparable from the Venetian heritage.

programme.title: Punta Del Este, Uruguay
programme.desc: With sprawling beaches, iconic monuments and a unique mix of colonial and modern architecture, it is the jewel of Uruguay's southern coast. Often called the “Pearl of the Atlantic”, likened with Miami and Cannes, it is the city of Punta del Este.

programme.title: Voronezh town, Russia
programme.desc: In the southern part of Russia, by the river Voronezh, there is a city with the same name. It has a long history of remarkable men and women who prospered and fell here. The city fought for freedom countless times and brought a lot of talented artists to the world. It is a city of strong people and fantastic architecture. Voronezh was founded in 1585 when tsar Fyodor ordered to start the building of a new fortress on the Voronezh-river's bank to create a barrier from southern invasions. The fortress was finished around 1586 and defended Russians only for four years before it was burnt to the ground by cossacks.

programme.title: The Trinity Cathedral, Saint Petersburg, Russia
programme.desc: Spread out on the coast of the Gulf of Finland, at the mouth of the Neva River, St. Petersburg is the second-largest city in Russia. Witness of both military and civil history, the Trinity Cathedral of Izmailovsky, part of the historic center of St. Peter"&"sburg is a world heritage site.

programme.title: Novi Sad Synagogue, Serbia
programme.desc: Right in the city center of Novi Sad, Serbia, this crucial area, on Jevrejska Street – literally, Jewish Street - the synagogue of Novi Sad occupies a prominent spot both geographically as well as in the historical annals of the city.

programme.title: Mar Elias Monastery
programme.desc: Mar Elias monastery lies on the side of the road from Jerusalem and Bethlehem. It is maintained by the Greek-Orthodox church, and by local tradition Elijah rested here while fleeing from Queen Jezebel

programme.title: HOTELS in Rio de Janeiro
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Paris in France (Part 3)

programme.title: Saschiz Old Town, Romania
programme.desc: Saschiz, village, and commune, Mureș județ county is located in central Romania. The villages of Saschiz, Mihai Viteazu, and Cloașterf make up the larger commune of Saschiz. Located in the old region of Transylvania, it lies about 20 km east of Sighișoara"&". First documented in the 14th century, Saschiz is known for its medieval fortress and church constructed by Transylvanian Saxons, a German speaker. They settled in Transylvania when it was part of Hungary. The ruins of the 14th-century fortress sit atop "&"a hill overlooking the village. The late 15th-century fortified church has Gothic details and an imposing clock tower. Along with five other villages with fortified churches, Saschiz was inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage sites in 1999.

programme.title: Andros Town, Andros Island, Cyclades, Greece
programme.desc: Known for its shipowners, captains, and countless treasures, the Island of Andros has been away from mass tourism for years, which works to its advantage!

programme.title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: Brooklyn
programme.desc: When you think New York City, you probably envision Manhattan. Yet a lot of the city's heart and soul resides in Brooklyn. As one of the five boroughs in the USA's largest city, Brooklyn is actually quite huge. But don't let the size alarm you—this borough has a low-key, neighborhood vibe that's devoid of the Manhattan hustle. Add in diverse neighborhoods, great food and unexpected businesses, and Brooklyn is a place to love.

programme.title: Something in the Water
programme.desc: Chronicles singer-songwriter Steve Azar's endeavor to record his album Down at the Liquor Store at the historic Club Ebony in Indianola, Mississippi with a group of storied musicians.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: In the middle of rural Maine, Paul and Nick create an outside barbeque for the family of John Mann, an eighth generation Ulster-Scot immigrant. The Manns are true frontier-people, and completely self sufficient from their land.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Chefs Paul Rankin and Nick Nairn are in Lexington, Virginia to cook for descendants of the Ulster-Scots Lewis family who settled in the area in the 18th century. Along the way they visit a heritage pig farmer, taste some sparkling cider and they discover some delicious goat's cheese in the heart of Virginia's Piedmont region where Paul has a close encounter with a friendly goat…

programme.title: Playgrounds
programme.desc: See some of the best playgrounds in the USA through the lens of athletes.

programme.title: USA Through Music
programme.desc: American cities have long played a starring role in its music. Notable musicians tell personal stories about how their favorite cities inspire their work.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: Chicago is a city of both innovation and tradition. From immigrants cooking up classics to world-renowned chefs creating new concoctions with modern technology, Andrew gets a taste of Chicago's diverse food scene.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: Andrew takes to the road to sample the Pennsylvania staples most people never hear about. A Japanese superstar chef cooks up poisonous sexual organs and a family boils up every part of the pig.

programme.title: Diners Drive-ins and Dives Sammies and Stews
programme.desc: In Santa Fe, N.M., the cafe with a native Kenyan in the kitchen serving up totally fresh fish. And in Albuquerque, N.M., the school lunch maven crankin' out creative sammies like turkey avocado with green apple chile chutney.
